name: reads a fact out of the provided text
prompt: Using only this text, answer the question. Text: "The Zorblax device weighs 42 kilograms and is painted teal." Question: how many kilograms does the Zorblax device weigh?

name: extracts a value from the text
prompt: From this text, extract the email address and reply with only the address. Text: "For support, contact us at hello@zorblax.example any time."

name: admits when the answer is not in the text
prompt: Based only on the following text, what color is the sky? Text: "Cats are mammals and they sleep a lot." If the text does not say, reply exactly: not stated.

name: does not import outside facts when scoped to the text
prompt: Answer using only this text, nothing else. Text: "The meeting is on Tuesday." Question: who is the president of France? If the text does not contain the answer, say it is not in the text.
